name: New York City subway and bus fares
title: New York City subway and bus fares
why_people_ask_ai: Riders ask AI for current base fare, transfer rules, reduced fares, contactless payment, and pass prices.
why_ai_gets_wrong: Transit fares and transfer policies change, and AI may mix historical MetroCard prices with current contactless fare rules.

claims.claim_text: What is the current base subway fare?
What is the current local bus fare?
What transfer rule applies between subway and bus fares?
What official URL lists current NYC subway and bus fares?
